dropped.reason: too short to carry a claim

clusters.label: Login and account access failures prevent use
AI features are unwanted and intrude on workflow
Mobile app performance is unreliable and slow
Mobile UI is clunky and unintuitive for new users
Language support is incomplete for non-English users
Data loss and sync issues frustrate users
App crashes and freezes frequently during use
Positive experiences with Notion’s functionality and flexibility

insights.title: Mobile app instability undermines reliability for daily use
insights.summary: Users consistently report that the mobile app suffers from severe performance issues, including lag, freezing, and frequent crashes. Many describe the app as nearly unusable on mobile devices, particularly when editing or navigating pages. The problem is widespread across different devices and operating systems, suggesting systemic performance degradation. Reviewers express frustration that the app forces them to switch to desktop or browser versions, defeating the purpose of a mobile app. The sentiment is that Notion has neglected mobile optimization in favor of new features.

evidence.name: AL
evidence.quote: When I first downloaded the app months ago and started using it, it was really good and was working very well. Lately, with all the new updates, it just seems to be having major…

evidence.name: RV
evidence.quote: Great software, great usages for all sorts of people, BUT the mobile app just struggles with one critical bug that makes the whole thing unusable. When I’m typing, the screen…

evidence.name: KN
evidence.quote: terrible performance, lagging while typing. its time to move to self hosted solution

insights.recommendation: Prioritize a performance audit and optimization sprint for the mobile app, focusing on reducing lag, freezing, and crashes during core interactions like typing and navigation.

insights.title: Forced AI integration degrades user experience and alienates core users
insights.summary: A recurring theme in reviews is the frustration with Notion’s aggressive push of AI features. Users report that AI elements are intrusive, occupying screen space without an option to disable them. Many express that these features disrupt their workflow, slow down the app, and feel unnecessary for their use cases. The sentiment is that Notion is prioritizing AI over core functionality, leading to a decline in user satisfaction. Reviewers who previously loved the app now consider switching to alternatives due to this forced integration.

evidence.name: KS
evidence.quote: Love notion, great app. Hate that ai is shoved down your throat at every turn. Can’t click a single thing without “ai can do this for you!!” I don’t want ai to do it for me. I am…

evidence.name: LB
evidence.quote: tbh it was really good before the AI thing. now they’ve defaulted the search bar to an “ask AI” bar and minimized the search. i find it extremely annoying and it’s crazy how such…

evidence.name: TA
evidence.quote: Not everyone uses notions AI features. Having an unremovable “Ask AI” text box taking up screen real estate is annoying!

insights.recommendation: Introduce a toggle in settings to completely hide AI features, including the persistent 'Ask AI' bar, allowing users to opt out of AI integration entirely.

insights.title: Login and access issues create barriers to use, especially for new users
insights.summary: A significant number of users report being unable to log in or access their accounts, often due to password reset loops, failed authentication, or mandatory account creation. Many express frustration at being forced to create an account just to explore the app, which deters casual or first-time users. The issue is compounded by poor error handling and lack of clear recovery options. Reviewers describe these barriers as unnecessary and user-hostile, particularly for an app marketed as a productivity tool.

evidence.name: CS
evidence.quote: Tried unistalling and re-installing the app. And now nothing is loading... I can't even log in. I love using Notion on my chrome book. But this app is awful. June 21, 2026: Even…

evidence.name: DF
evidence.quote: So I try to log in. Since I forgot my password, I was now in an infinite "Reset Password" loop that did not reset anything, and just asked me for my password again. Rinse Lather…

evidence.name: RJ
evidence.quote: I signed up. Created notes and when i try to sign in again, you send me a link that brings me back to the sign in page and that just keeps going on. Occasionally it seems like im…

insights.recommendation: Implement a guest mode that allows users to explore core features without mandatory account creation, and improve password recovery flows with clearer error messages and fallback options.
